LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_LOTUS_BOX.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Lexkra[/gold].
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_LOTUS_BOX.flavor: A magical food that fully replenishes after battle, a classic JRPG trope.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_LOTUS_BOX.title: Lotus Rhizomes
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_XIANG_PIAO_PIAO.descrip: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Lexkra[/gold].
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_XIANG_PIAO_PIAO.flavor: A popular drink among ninjas; it's unclear if it's a secret recipe or just a tradition.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_XIANG_PIAO_PIAO.title: Xiang Piao Piao Hot Drink
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_KFC.flavor: A fast food brand popular among Mortals, which has introduced many new items tailored to ninja tastes.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_KFC.title: KFC
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_DIM_DEAD_TREE.descripti: At the start of your turn, your next [gold]Ninjutsu[/gold] activation costs no [gold]Lexkra[/gold].
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_DIM_DEAD_TREE.flavor: Rumor has it that Master Annai attained enlightenment beneath the Dark Cold Dead Tree.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_DIM_DEAD_TREE.title: Dark Cold Dead Tree
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_REAPER_HAND.flavor:
The tale of Bleach vs. Naruto, surely everyone's heard of it?
This boss is super tough for me.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_REAPER_HAND.title: Bleach Hand
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_MACHINE_NINJA.descripti: At the start of your turn, your next [gold]Kagaku Ningu[/gold] card is played twice.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_MACHINE_NINJA.flavor: A ninja is not born different, but excels at using tools.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_MACHINE_NINJA.title: Mecha Ninja: Diesel Machine
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_SARIRA.description:
When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue] or below, heal [green]{Heal}%[/green] of your HP.
After this effect triggers, spend [red]22,000,000[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold].
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_SARIRA.flavor: The power to overdraw wealth and alter fate lies within...
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_SARIRA.title: Sarira
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_THREE_DUUZ.description: Each turn, the first time you play a [gold]Ninjutsu[/gold] card, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_THREE_DUUZ.flavor: Ohh, FUMO, still cute, truly wanna pay for it.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_THREE_DUUZ.title: 3D Yuyuko
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_TOILET_WATER.descriptio: Each combat, when you draw the first [blue]{Count}[/blue] [red]Curse[/red] cards, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_TOILET_WATER.flavor: Originally a liquid meant to soothe insect bites, it surprisingly has great cleansing effects.
LEX_NINJA2_RELIC_TOILET_WATER.title: Florida Water
SEA_GLASS.LEX_NINJA2.title: Ninjutsu
